title: Invited Speakers Announced
body: Meet our invited speakers: Xiaoxiao Li (UBC) and Anirban Mukhopadhyay (TU Darmstadt). Visit the Workshop Program page for bios.

title: Workshop announced
body: First edition of CLiMeM will be held at MICCAI 2026. Call for papers and important dates to follow.

title: Website launched
body: Workshop website is live. Check back for program, submission guidelines, and speaker updates.
